testrun.footerText: Generated by IntelliJ IDEA on 3/27/26, 3:23 PM
testrun.name: All in civicconnect

com.intellij.rt.junit.JUnitStarter -ideVersion5 -junit5 @w@C:\Users\2479740\AppData\Local\Temp\idea_working_dirs_junit.tmp @C:\Users\2479740\AppData\Local\Temp\idea_junit.tmp -socket53042

2026-03-27T15:21:07.839+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ionShutdownHook] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Closing JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-03-27T15:21:07.841+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ionShutdownHook] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Shutdown initiated... 2026-03-27T15:21:07.846+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ionShutdownHook] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Shutdown completed.

test.name: POST /resolutions — 403 when CITIZEN role tries to access
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:00.646+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : [AccessDenied] on POST /api/v1/resolutions: Access Denied

test.name: PATCH /resolutions/steps/{id}/status — 400 on invalid transition
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:00.778+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : [WorkflowStepTransitionException] Business exception on PATCH /api/v1/resolutions/steps/1/status: Invalid workflow step status transition: COMPLETED → IN_PROGRESS. Allowed flow: PENDING → IN_PROGRESS → COMPLETED (forward only)

test.name: POST /resolutions — 400 when actions is blank
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:00.880+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : [ValidationFailure] on POST /api/v1/resolutions: fields=[actions]

test.name: POST /resolutions — 409 when resolution already exists
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:00.902+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : [ResolutionAlreadyExistsException] Business exception on POST /api/v1/resolutions: A resolution already exists for service request #10. Only one resolution is allowed per request.

test.name: POST /resolutions — 403 when wrong officer tries to create
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:00.920+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : [UnauthorizedResolutionAccessException] Business exception on POST /api/v1/resolutions: Only assigned officer can create a resolution

test.name: POST /feedback — 409 when feedback already submitted
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:01.769+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : [FeedbackAlreadySubmittedException] Business exception on POST /api/v1/feedback: Feedback has already been submitted for service request #10. Only one feedback per request is allowed.

test.name: POST /feedback — 400 when rating is zero
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:01.796+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : [ValidationFailure] on POST /api/v1/feedback: fields=[rating]

test.name: POST /feedback — 400 when rating is out of range
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:01.806+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : [ValidationFailure] on POST /api/v1/feedback: fields=[rating]

test.name: POST /feedback — 400 when request is not CLOSED
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:01.821+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : [FeedbackNotAllowedException] Business exception on POST /api/v1/feedback: Feedback can only be submitted for CLOSED requests.

test.name: addWorkflowStep — success adds step to IN_PROGRESS resolution
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:02.333+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ResolutionService : [Module 4 - Resolution] Officer 2 adding workflow step to resolutionId: 1 2026-03-27T15:21:02.334+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ResolutionService : [Module 4 - Resolution] WorkflowStep #1 added to resolution #1

test.name: updateWorkflowStepStatus — wrong user throws UnauthorizedResolutionAccessException
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:02.398+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ResolutionService : [Module 4 - Resolution] User 99 updating step #1 status to IN_PROGRESS 2026-03-27T15:21:02.398+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ResolutionService : [Module 4 - Resolution] Step update denied — user 99 is not assigned to step #1

test.name: getResolutionById — not found throws ResourceNotFoundException
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:02.406+05:30 DEBUG 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ResolutionService : [Module 4 - Resolution] Fetching resolution #99

test.name: createResolution — duplicate resolution throws ResolutionAlreadyExistsException
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:02.413+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ResolutionService : [Module 4 - Resolution] Officer 2 creating resolution for requestId: 10 2026-03-27T15:21:02.414+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ResolutionService : [Module 4 - Resolution] Create failed — resolution already exists for requestId: 10

test.name: addWorkflowStep — non-SERVICE_OFFICER assignee throws InvalidOperationException
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:02.419+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ResolutionService : [Module 4 - Resolution] Officer 2 adding workflow step to resolutionId: 1 2026-03-27T15:21:02.420+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ResolutionService : [Module 4 - Resolution] Add step failed — user 1 has role CITY_ADMINISTRATOR (must be SERVICE_OFFICER)

test.name: createResolution — success creates resolution and updates request to IN_PROGRESS
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:02.426+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ResolutionService : [Module 4 - Resolution] Officer 2 creating resolution for requestId: 10 2026-03-27T15:21:02.428+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ResolutionService : [Module 4 - Resolution] Resolution #1 created for requestId: 10

test.name: updateWorkflowStepStatus — last step COMPLETED cascades resolution to COMPLETED and request to RESOLVED
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:02.443+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ResolutionService : [Module 4 - Resolution] User 2 updating step #1 status to COMPLETED 2026-03-27T15:21:02.444+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ResolutionService : [Module 4 - Resolution] Step #1 status updated to COMPLETED 2026-03-27T15:21:02.445+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ResolutionService : [Module 4 - Resolution] All steps completed — marking resolution #1 as COMPLETED 2026-03-27T15:21:02.445+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ResolutionService : [Module 4 - Resolution] ServiceRequest #10 marked as RESOLVED

test.name: createResolution — wrong officer throws UnauthorizedResolutionAccessException
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:02.456+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ResolutionService : [Module 4 - Resolution] Officer 99 creating resolution for requestId: 10 2026-03-27T15:21:02.457+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ResolutionService : [Module 4 - Resolution] Create failed — officer 99 is NOT the assigned officer for request #10

test.name: addWorkflowStep — resolution not IN_PROGRESS throws InvalidOperationException
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:02.461+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ResolutionService : [Module 4 - Resolution] Officer 2 adding workflow step to resolutionId: 1 2026-03-27T15:21:02.461+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ResolutionService : [Module 4 - Resolution] Add step failed — resolution #1 is not IN_PROGRESS (status=COMPLETED)

test.name: updateWorkflowStepStatus — PENDING to IN_PROGRESS succeeds
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:02.464+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ResolutionService : [Module 4 - Resolution] User 2 updating step #1 status to IN_PROGRESS 2026-03-27T15:21:02.464+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ResolutionService : [Module 4 - Resolution] Step #1 status updated to IN_PROGRESS

test.name: createResolution — request not ASSIGNED throws InvalidOperationException
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:02.468+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ResolutionService : [Module 4 - Resolution] Officer 2 creating resolution for requestId: 10 2026-03-27T15:21:02.469+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ResolutionService : [Module 4 - Resolution] Create failed — request #10 is not ASSIGNED (status=SUBMITTED)

test.name: updateWorkflowStepStatus — invalid transition throws WorkflowStepTransitionException
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:02.474+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ResolutionService : [Module 4 - Resolution] User 2 updating step #1 status to IN_PROGRESS 2026-03-27T15:21:02.474+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ResolutionService : [Module 4 - Resolution] Invalid step transition: COMPLETED → IN_PROGRESS

test.name: assignOfficer — non-SERVICE_OFFICER throws InvalidOperationException
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:02.538+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ServiceRequestService : [Module 3 - ServiceRequest] Admin 99 assigning officer 1 to request #10 2026-03-27T15:21:02.539+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ServiceRequestService : [Module 3 - ServiceRequest] Assign failed — user 1 has role CITY_ADMINISTRATOR not SERVICE_OFFICER

test.name: closeRequest — not RESOLVED throws InvalidOperationException
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:02.545+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ServiceRequestService : [Module 3 - ServiceRequest] Citizen userId 6 closing request #10 2026-03-27T15:21:02.545+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ServiceRequestService : [Module 3 - ServiceRequest] Close failed — request #10 is not RESOLVED (status=SUBMITTED)

test.name: assignOfficer — already assigned request throws RequestNotAssignableException
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:02.550+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ServiceRequestService : [Module 3 - ServiceRequest] Admin 1 assigning officer 2 to request #10 2026-03-27T15:21:02.550+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ServiceRequestService : [Module 3 - ServiceRequest] Assign failed — request #10 is not SUBMITTED (status=ASSIGNED)

test.name: assignOfficer — success assigns SERVICE_OFFICER
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:02.558+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ServiceRequestService : [Module 3 - ServiceRequest] Admin 1 assigning officer 2 to request #10 2026-03-27T15:21:02.559+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ServiceRequestService : [Module 3 - ServiceRequest] Request #10 assigned to officer Ravi

test.name: submitRequest — INACTIVE citizen throws InactiveCitizenException
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:02.564+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ServiceRequestService : [Module 3 - ServiceRequest] Citizen 1 submitting ROAD request at 'MG Road' 2026-03-27T15:21:02.565+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ServiceRequestService : [Module 3 - ServiceRequest] Submit blocked — citizen 1 account is not ACTIVE

test.name: submitRequest — success for ACTIVE citizen
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:02.571+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ServiceRequestService : [Module 3 - ServiceRequest] Citizen 1 submitting WATER request at 'Park Street' 2026-03-27T15:21:02.572+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ServiceRequestService : [Module 3 - ServiceRequest] Request #10 submitted by citizen 1

test.name: closeRequest — RESOLVED request closes successfully
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:02.577+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ServiceRequestService : [Module 3 - ServiceRequest] Citizen userId 6 closing request #10 2026-03-27T15:21:02.577+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.service.ServiceRequestService : [Module 3 - ServiceRequest] Request #10 CLOSED by citizen

test.name: POST /auth/login — 403 when account is suspended
test.output: MockHttpServletRequest: HTTP Method = POST Request URI = /api/v1/auth/login Parameters = {_csrf=[mQxY5XVuiMebn_bSKXID3iK9Az1lyxz1WXJrJi9q4MukYxyF-Ghr1RBcvPS2qMPqSl83vxDcLgVW_XnYbxBaQBxT1v-SACrk]} Headers = [Content-Type:"application/json;charset=UTF-8", Content-Length:"50"] Body = {"email":"admin@civic.com","password":"Admin@123"} Session Attrs = {} Handler: Type = null Async: Async started = false Async result = null Resolved Exception: Type = null ModelAndView: View name = null View = null Model = null FlashMap: Attributes = null MockHttpServletResponse: Status = 401 Error message = Unauthorized Headers = [Vary:"Origin", "Access-Control-Request-Method", "Access-Control-Request-Headers", WWW-Authenticate:"Basic realm="Realm"", X-Content-Type-Options:"nosniff", X-XSS-Protection:"0", Cache-Control:"no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate", Pragma:"no-cache", Expires:"0", X-Frame-Options:"DENY"] Content type = null Body = Forwarded URL = null Redirected URL = null Cookies = []

java.lang.AssertionError: Status expected:<403> but was:<401> at org.springframework.test.util.AssertionErrors.fail(AssertionErrors.java:59) at org.springframework.test.util.AssertionErrors.assertEquals(AssertionErrors.java:122) at org.springframework.test.web.servlet.result.StatusResultMatchers.lambda$matcher$9(StatusResultMatchers.java:637) at org.springframework.test.web.servlet.MockMvc$1.andExpect(MockMvc.java:214) at com.civicconnect.controller.AuthControllerTest.login_suspendedAccount_returns403(AuthControllerTest.java:121) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596)

test.name: POST /auth/login — 400 when password is blank
test.output: MockHttpServletRequest: HTTP Method = POST Request URI = /api/v1/auth/login Parameters = {_csrf=[n-5ZAfQXPGUiNfbK6RKYjdsbVVgulDQvzLhLc2Jg8N06zWEmp4o7OMcuDwcPVJeujT-s7LoieDoZpgACqIx-EFJWxL5crFVF]} Headers = [Content-Type:"application/json;charset=UTF-8", Content-Length:"41"] Body = {"email":"admin@civic.com","password":""} Session Attrs = {} Handler: Type = null Async: Async started = false Async result = null Resolved Exception: Type = null ModelAndView: View name = null View = null Model = null FlashMap: Attributes = null MockHttpServletResponse: Status = 401 Error message = Unauthorized Headers = [Vary:"Origin", "Access-Control-Request-Method", "Access-Control-Request-Headers", WWW-Authenticate:"Basic realm="Realm"", X-Content-Type-Options:"nosniff", X-XSS-Protection:"0", Cache-Control:"no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate", Pragma:"no-cache", Expires:"0", X-Frame-Options:"DENY"] Content type = null Body = Forwarded URL = null Redirected URL = null Cookies = []

test.name: POST /auth/login — 200 on valid credentials
test.output: MockHttpServletRequest: HTTP Method = POST Request URI = /api/v1/auth/login Parameters = {_csrf=[cKJDoVqEtITM5Xzt4ZgJCD6aZ3-03Vhc8B0gZuxupVxp6ExeQJp0x23igrzh0hnd2bU9Owr7SkaD7DxxkXsQUt0IlW4K3y5n]} Headers = [Content-Type:"application/json;charset=UTF-8", Content-Length:"50"] Body = {"email":"admin@civic.com","password":"Admin@123"} Session Attrs = {} Handler: Type = null Async: Async started = false Async result = null Resolved Exception: Type = null ModelAndView: View name = null View = null Model = null FlashMap: Attributes = null MockHttpServletResponse: Status = 401 Error message = Unauthorized Headers = [Vary:"Origin", "Access-Control-Request-Method", "Access-Control-Request-Headers", WWW-Authenticate:"Basic realm="Realm"", X-Content-Type-Options:"nosniff", X-XSS-Protection:"0", Cache-Control:"no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate", Pragma:"no-cache", Expires:"0", X-Frame-Options:"DENY"] Content type = null Body = Forwarded URL = null Redirected URL = null Cookies = []

test.name: POST /auth/login — 400 when email is blank
test.output: MockHttpServletRequest: HTTP Method = POST Request URI = /api/v1/auth/login Parameters = {_csrf=[2DVyQ_OQdlNJRGye3hz8ilxqQti83XDTRhp2nBB3jn6Nvp1D6Q1AIsehR2JkJ1is6DHI7zkLb7rf7hT-JHxCrSVGuhu726ly]} Headers = [Content-Type:"application/json;charset=UTF-8", Content-Length:"35"] Body = {"email":"","password":"Admin@123"} Session Attrs = {} Handler: Type = null Async: Async started = false Async result = null Resolved Exception: Type = null ModelAndView: View name = null View = null Model = null FlashMap: Attributes = null MockHttpServletResponse: Status = 401 Error message = Unauthorized Headers = [Vary:"Origin", "Access-Control-Request-Method", "Access-Control-Request-Headers", WWW-Authenticate:"Basic realm="Realm"", X-Content-Type-Options:"nosniff", X-XSS-Protection:"0", Cache-Control:"no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate", Pragma:"no-cache", Expires:"0", X-Frame-Options:"DENY"] Content type = null Body = Forwarded URL = null Redirected URL = null Cookies = []

test.name: POST /auth/login — 401 when credentials are invalid
test.output: MockHttpServletRequest: HTTP Method = POST Request URI = /api/v1/auth/login Parameters = {_csrf=[W6A6Yq8vwbCfFjcEovd74OVQqBryA4So32hpLTRa6fFVk4_9OsVeVs4coNWyJQM1mtpPhYFkhSLEYbKF7VlYHABv2MhjqurL]} Headers = [Content-Type:"application/json;charset=UTF-8", Content-Length:"50"] Body = {"email":"admin@civic.com","password":"wrongpass"} Session Attrs = {} Handler: Type = null Async: Async started = false Async result = null Resolved Exception: Type = null ModelAndView: View name = null View = null Model = null FlashMap: Attributes = null MockHttpServletResponse: Status = 401 Error message = Unauthorized Headers = [Vary:"Origin", "Access-Control-Request-Method", "Access-Control-Request-Headers", WWW-Authenticate:"Basic realm="Realm"", X-Content-Type-Options:"nosniff", X-XSS-Protection:"0", Cache-Control:"no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate", Pragma:"no-cache", Expires:"0", X-Frame-Options:"DENY"] Content type = null Body = Forwarded URL = null Redirected URL = null Cookies = []

test.name: POST /auth/login — 400 when email is invalid format
test.output: MockHttpServletRequest: HTTP Method = POST Request URI = /api/v1/auth/login Parameters = {_csrf=[No9fFA0usRFxx0TMCxESFv4UMTEgurCBTuSE6z8paWeE1_-zVe5rIzge13Nc8iX7MjwmJ80sHFMYjImseN222F0dDQbh48yK]} Headers = [Content-Type:"application/json;charset=UTF-8", Content-Length:"47"] Body = {"email":"not-an-email","password":"Admin@123"} Session Attrs = {} Handler: Type = null Async: Async started = false Async result = null Resolved Exception: Type = null ModelAndView: View name = null View = null Model = null FlashMap: Attributes = null MockHttpServletResponse: Status = 401 Error message = Unauthorized Headers = [Vary:"Origin", "Access-Control-Request-Method", "Access-Control-Request-Headers", WWW-Authenticate:"Basic realm="Realm"", X-Content-Type-Options:"nosniff", X-XSS-Protection:"0", Cache-Control:"no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate", Pragma:"no-cache", Expires:"0", X-Frame-Options:"DENY"] Content type = null Body = Forwarded URL = null Redirected URL = null Cookies = []

test.name: login — suspended account throws AccountSuspendedException
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:07.645+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] com.civicconnect.service.AuthService : [Module 1 - IAM] Login attempt for email: test@civic.com 2026-03-27T15:21:07.647+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] com.civicconnect.service.AuthService : [Module 1 - IAM] Login blocked — account SUSPENDED for userId: 1

test.name: login — success returns JWT token
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:07.652+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] com.civicconnect.service.AuthService : [Module 1 - IAM] Login attempt for email: test@civic.com 2026-03-27T15:21:07.652+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] com.civicconnect.service.AuthService : [Module 1 - IAM] Login successful for userId: 1 role: CITY_ADMINISTRATOR

test.name: login — INACTIVE account is allowed (citizen uploads docs before activation)
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:07.655+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] com.civicconnect.service.AuthService : [Module 1 - IAM] Login attempt for email: test@civic.com 2026-03-27T15:21:07.655+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] com.civicconnect.service.AuthService : [Module 1 - IAM] Login successful for userId: 1 role: CITY_ADMINISTRATOR

test.name: login — wrong password throws InvalidCredentialsException
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:07.658+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] com.civicconnect.service.AuthService : [Module 1 - IAM] Login attempt for email: test@civic.com 2026-03-27T15:21:07.658+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] com.civicconnect.service.AuthService : [Module 1 - IAM] Login failed — wrong password for userId: 1

test.name: login — unknown email throws InvalidCredentialsException
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:07.661+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] com.civicconnect.service.AuthService : [Module 1 - IAM] Login attempt for email: test@civic.com 2026-03-27T15:21:07.662+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] com.civicconnect.service.AuthService : [Module 1 - IAM] Login failed — no account for email: test@civic.com

suite.name: GlobalExceptionHandler — Exception Hierarchy & HTTP Status Tests

test.name: UnauthorizedComplianceAccessException maps to 403 FORBIDDEN
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:07.666+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : [UnauthorizedComplianceAccessException] Business exception on GET /api/v1/test: Access denied: only COMPLIANCE_OFFICERs can create records

test.name: FeedbackAlreadySubmittedException maps to 409 CONFLICT
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:07.670+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : [FeedbackAlreadySubmittedException] Business exception on GET /api/v1/test: Feedback has already been submitted for service request #5. Only one feedback per request is allowed.

test.name: DuplicateResourceException maps to 409 CONFLICT
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:07.672+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : [DuplicateResourceException] Business exception on GET /api/v1/test: Email exists

test.name: ResolutionAlreadyExistsException maps to 409 CONFLICT
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:07.674+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : [ResolutionAlreadyExistsException] Business exception on GET /api/v1/test: A resolution already exists for service request #10. Only one resolution is allowed per request.

test.name: InvalidOperationException maps to 400 BAD_REQUEST
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:07.675+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : [InvalidOperationException] Business exception on GET /api/v1/test: Cannot do this

test.name: UnauthorizedNotificationAccessException maps to 403 FORBIDDEN
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:07.678+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : [UnauthorizedNotificationAccessException] Business exception on GET /api/v1/test: Access denied: you do not own notification #7

test.name: ResourceNotFoundException maps to 404 NOT_FOUND
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:07.679+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : [ResourceNotFoundException] Business exception on GET /api/v1/test: Resolution not found with id: 1

test.name: ErrorResponse always includes path and timestamp
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:07.680+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : [ResourceNotFoundException] Business exception on GET /api/v1/test: Test not found with id: 1

test.name: AccountSuspendedException maps to 403 FORBIDDEN
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:07.686+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : [AccountSuspendedException] Business exception on GET /api/v1/test: Account is SUSPENDED for: test@civic.com. Please contact the administrator.

test.name: InvalidCredentialsException maps to 401 UNAUTHORIZED
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:07.688+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : [InvalidCredentialsException] Business exception on GET /api/v1/test: Invalid credentials — email or password is incorrect.

test.name: WorkflowStepTransitionException maps to 400 BAD_REQUEST
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:07.689+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : [WorkflowStepTransitionException] Business exception on GET /api/v1/test: Invalid workflow step status transition: COMPLETED → IN_PROGRESS. Allowed flow: PENDING → IN_PROGRESS → COMPLETED (forward only)

test.name: Catch-all handler maps to 500 INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:07.692+05:30 ERROR 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.c.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : [UnexpectedError] on GET /api/v1/test: Unexpected java.lang.RuntimeException: Unexpected at com.civicconnect.controller.GlobalExceptionHandlerTest.catchAll_maps500(GlobalExceptionHandlerTest.java:113) ~[test-classes/:na] at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) ~[na:na] at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) ~[na:na] at test.name: submitFeedback — duplicate feedback throws FeedbackAlreadySubmittedException
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:07.802+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.civicconnect.service.FeedbackService : [Module 5 - Feedback] Citizen 1 submitting feedback for requestId: 10 rating: 3 2026-03-27T15:21:07.803+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.civicconnect.service.FeedbackService : [Module 5 - Feedback] Duplicate feedback for requestId: 10

test.name: submitFeedback — request not CLOSED throws FeedbackNotAllowedException
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:07.810+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.civicconnect.service.FeedbackService : [Module 5 - Feedback] Citizen 1 submitting feedback for requestId: 10 rating: 4 2026-03-27T15:21:07.810+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.civicconnect.service.FeedbackService : [Module 5 - Feedback] Feedback denied — request #10 is not CLOSED (status=RESOLVED)

test.name: submitFeedback — success saves feedback and updates satisfaction metric
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:07.815+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.civicconnect.service.FeedbackService : [Module 5 - Feedback] Citizen 1 submitting feedback for requestId: 10 rating: 5 2026-03-27T15:21:07.815+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.civicconnect.service.FeedbackService : [Module 5 - Feedback] Feedback #1 saved for requestId: 10 2026-03-27T15:21:07.817+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.civicconnect.service.FeedbackService : [Module 5 - Feedback] Satisfaction metric updated for officer Ravi — new avg: 5.00

test.name: submitFeedback — wrong citizen throws FeedbackNotAllowedException
test.output: 2026-03-27T15:21:07.824+05:30 INFO 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.civicconnect.service.FeedbackService : [Module 5 - Feedback] Citizen 99 submitting feedback for requestId: 10 rating: 3 2026-03-27T15:21:07.824+05:30 WARN 27604 --- [civicconnect] [ main] c.civicconnect.service.FeedbackService : [Module 5 - Feedback] Feedback denied — citizen 99 does not own request #10
